name: Vishnu Priyaan
headline: Designing Enterprise Systems for Tomorrow
bio: Fifteen years architecting the platforms large enterprises run on — ServiceNow and Flexera transformations across regulated BFSI, manufacturing and global GCC environments, from Commonwealth Bank of Australia to Cognizant, Wipro, Trianz and EY.

My territory spans the full estate: ITSM, ITOM Discovery and CMDB/CSDM data governance on ServiceNow; the ITAM toolchain end to end — Flexera One, FlexNet Manager Suite, SaaS Manager and the Flexera Data Platform, backed by BigFix/ILMT, Tanium, SCCM and Snow; observability on Observe (OTEL), SolarWinds and PagerDuty; and AWS-certified cloud architecture tying it together.

The results are measured, not claimed: CAD 1.4M+ in platform cost savings, 45–50% faster detection and recovery, ~98% SLA compliance at bank scale. I believe architecture is a creative act — the best systems feel inevitable in hindsight.

principles.title: Model before you build
principles.detail: A platform is only as good as its data model. CSDM first, configuration second, customisation last.

principles.title: Govern the estate, not the tool
principles.detail: Licences, CIs and endpoints drift the moment nobody owns them. Cadence beats heroics — audits should find nothing.

principles.title: Design for the operator at 3 a.m.
principles.detail: Architecture is judged in incidents, not slide decks. Clarity under pressure is the real requirement.
